nasb.text: They will be divided, father against son and son against father, mother against daughter and daughter against mother, mother-in-law against daughter-in-law and daughter-in-law against mother-in-law.”

esv.text: They will be divided, father against son and son against father, mother against daughter and daughter against mother, mother-in-law against her daughter-in-law and daughter-in-law against mother-in-law.”

cnv.text: 他們將起紛爭： 父親反對兒子， 兒子反對父親， 母親反對女兒， 女兒反對母親， 婆婆反對媳婦， 媳婦反對婆婆。”

ccb.text: 父子相争，母女对立，婆媳反目。”

csbs.text: 他们将要分裂：父亲反对儿子， 儿子反对父亲而分裂； 母亲反对女儿， 女儿反对母亲而分裂； 婆婆反对媳妇， 媳妇反对婆婆而分裂。      ”
